# Privacy Policy — LanaLibre
Last updated: May 2026
Data controller: Lilja Svarva Antonsen
Contact: contacto@lanalibre.es (placeholder)

## 1. What data we collect
LanaLibre only collects the data needed for the app to function:

**Account data (managed by Google or Apple):**
- Username
- Email address
- Profile photo (if available)

**Usage data generated by you:**
- Crochet projects you create (name, tag, tools used)
- Journal entries, notes, and colour palettes
- Files you upload (PDF patterns, inspiration images)
- Calculator results and preview parameters

**Minimal technical data:**
- Registration date
- Language and visual theme preferences

## 2. How we use your data
Your data is used exclusively to:
- Allow you to access your account and projects
- Sync your content across devices
- Display your projects, journals, and saved results
- Send you local notifications if you have enabled them (on your device only)

LanaLibre does not sell your data, does not share it with third parties, and does not use it for advertising.

## 3. Where your data is stored
Your data is stored in Google Firebase (Cloud Firestore and Firebase Storage), with servers located in Europe (EUR3 region). Google Firebase complies with GDPR. You can review Firebase's privacy policy at firebase.google.com/support/privacy.

## 4. How long we keep your data
- Active projects: while you have an active account
- Deleted projects: 30 days, then permanently deleted
- Deleted account: all your data is removed from Firestore and Storage at the time of deletion

## 5. Your rights (GDPR)
As a user you have the right to:
- **Access** — know what data we hold about you
- **Rectification** — correct incorrect data
- **Erasure** — delete your account and all your data
- **Portability** — export your data in a downloadable format
- **Objection** — object to the processing of your data

To exercise any of these rights contact: contacto@lanalibre.es (placeholder)

You may also lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) at ico.org.uk.

## 6. Security
- Authentication is handled entirely by Google or Apple — LanaLibre never sees or stores your password
- Each user can only access their own data (Firestore security rules)
- All communication with Firebase is done over HTTPS
- Files in Storage are linked to your account and are not accessible by other users

## 7. Minors
LanaLibre is not intended for users under 16 years of age. If you are under 16 you must not use the app.

## 8. Changes to this policy
If we make significant changes to this policy you will be notified within the app. The last-updated date is always visible at the top of this document.

## 9. Contact
For any privacy enquiries or to exercise your rights: contacto@lanalibre.es (placeholder)
